prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: EVR-ASRO-21LDUFFLEBAG-BLK Product Type: DUFFEL_BAG Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 18L Everyday Carry Small Duffel Bag for Travel Gym Outdoor Gear, Black Description: Adventure awaits with ASR Outdoors small, durable and packable black duffel bag!

Made from high quality 600D polyester, this small duffel bag offers excellent resistance to wear and tear, making it ideal for daily use, travel, gym sessions or as a tools and equipment bag. The spacious main compartment provides ample room for essentials, while the additional side pocket keeps smaller items organized and easily accessible.

Designed with both comfort and functionality in mind, the adjustable shoulder strap ensures a comfortable carry, while the sturdy handles offer an alternate option for lifting and carrying. Whether you're heading to the gym, planning a day trip or weekend getaway, or simply need a reliable everyday carry, this small black duffel bag is your go to companion and ready for adventure!

Machine washable. Search Terms: duffel bag for travel; gym bag; tool bag; hiking gear; outdoor gear; gold prospecting equipment; camping essentials; carry on luggage; gifts for men; small duffel bag; back to school; edc gear; everyday carry; weekender bag Features: - SQUARE DUFFEL BAG: 18L small duffel bag is a versatile, all purpose travel bag, gym bag, tool bag and more, suitable for all kinds of indoor or outdoor recreation - DURABLE 600D POLYESTER: Resistant to wear and tear for long lasting use; spacious main compartment provides ample room to fit essentials, plus small outer pocket for quick access to small necessities - LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN: Weighing in at just 0.74lbs, the small duffel bag adds virtually no weight to whatever you’re packing; easily foldable material makes it great for travel - MACHINE WASHABLE: Small black duffel bag should be washed on cold cycle and left to hang or air dry - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 18 x 8 x 9 inches; Material: 600D polyester; Volume: 18L; Weight: 0.74lbs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 18L Small Black Duffel Bag

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 18-L Small Black Duffel Bag

anthropic.title_differentiation: 600D Polyester, Lightweight, Machine Washable, Travel Gym Bag, Everyday Carry
